content.full_text:
MEMORANDUM

April 24, 1991

TO: ADVICE FILE
No. M-91-273
a1-273

FROM: KEVIN S. BRAATEN-MOEN

SUBJECT: TELEPHONE ADVICE TO RICH EICHMAN RE: REPORTABLE COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH HOLDING A LUNCHEON

-------------------------------------------------------------

When a lobbyist employer is reporting costs associated with holding a luncheon which reportable individuals attend, the cost of flying the speaker to the event must be included in determining the total cost of the event. (§§86116 and 86111)
